name: Nickel 28 Capital Corp.
description: Nickel 28 Capital Corp. is a high-growth, diversified battery-metals company that provides investors with direct exposure to nickel and cobalt, which are critical components for electric vehicles and energy transition technologies. The company's asset base is anchored by an 8.56% joint-venture interest in the world-class, producing Ramu Nickel-Cobalt operation in Papua New Guinea. Additionally, Nickel 28 maintains a robust portfolio of nickel and cobalt royalties on various development and exploration projects globally, positioning itself as a key player in the supply chain for the rapidly expanding battery metals market.
